analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e class feature definitions. It correctly identifies the feature as belonging to the Sorcerer class and being acquired at 2nd level.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description clearly explains the mechanical purpose of the feature (introducing sorcery points) and its narrative flavor ('tap into a deep wellspring of magic').

mechanics.impact: Fundamental. This feature is the basis for all Sorcerer Metamagic and spell slot manipulation, defining the class's unique resource management system (Sorcery Points).

analysis.notes: The data is accurate for the Sorcerer class feature 'Font of Magic' from Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition.
